aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video
aspect_ratio.title: aspect_ratio

audio.description: Audio file (wav/mp3, 3-30s, ≤15MB) for voice/music synchronization. If not provided, the model auto-generates matching audio.
audio.title: Audio

duration.description: Duration of the generated video in seconds
duration.title: Duration

enable_prompt_expansion.description: Automatically expand and optimize the prompt for better results. Improves quality for short prompts but increases latency.
enable_prompt_expansion.title: Enable Prompt Expansion

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt — describes content that should not appear in the video
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

seed.description: Random seed for reproducible generation. Range: 0-2147483647
seed.title: Seed
